name: Towpath Service Plaza (Eastbound)
description: Eastbound Ohio Turnpike (I-80) service plaza at milepost 170 in Cuyahoga County with Sunoco fuel, food, truck parking, free showers and coin laundry.

name: Great Lakes Service Plaza (Westbound)
description: Westbound Ohio Turnpike (I-80) service plaza at milepost 170 in Cuyahoga County (between Exits 161 and 173) with Sunoco fuel, food, truck parking and free showers.

name: Brady's Leap Service Plaza (Eastbound)
description: Eastbound Ohio Turnpike (I-80) service plaza at milepost 197 in Portage County (Freedom Township) with Sunoco fuel, food, truck and RV overnight parking, and free showers.

name: Portage Service Plaza (Westbound)
description: Westbound Ohio Turnpike (I-80) service plaza at milepost 197 in Portage County with Sunoco fuel, food, truck parking, RV overnight spaces with hookups, and free showers.

name: Pilot Travel Center #3 (Austintown)
description: 24-hour Pilot travel center on free I-80 at Exit 223 (SR 46) with diesel, McDonald's, showers, truck service bay, truck wash and CAT scale.

name: TA Travel Center Youngstown #058
description: 24-hour TravelCenters of America truck stop on free I-80 at Exit 223A (SR 46) with diesel, restaurant, showers, laundry, five-bay TA Truck Service and CAT scale.

name: Pilot Travel Center #281 (Girard)
description: 24-hour Pilot travel center on free I-80 at Exit 226 (Salt Springs Road) with diesel, Subway, showers, on-site truck wash and CAT scale.

name: Petro Stopping Center Girard #320
description: Large Petro/TA truck stop on free I-80 at Exit 226 with 300+ truck spaces, 14 diesel lanes, Iron Skillet restaurant, 14 showers, laundry, TA Truck Service and CAT scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #370 (Hubbard)
description: 24-hour Love's travel stop on free I-80 at Exit 234 with diesel, Subway/Chester's, showers, laundry, tire and truck service bays and CAT scale.

name: Flying J Travel Center #697 (Hubbard)
description: 24-hour Pilot Flying J travel center on free I-80 at Exit 234 with diesel, 15 showers, food and truck parking near the Pennsylvania line.

name: Truck World
description: Family-owned independent truck stop on free I-80 at Exit 234 (est. 1971) with ~200 truck spaces, high-speed diesel, full-service restaurant, showers, on-site motel, Blue Beacon wash and a certified scale.

name: Pilot Travel Center #3 - CAT Scale
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Pilot travel center on free I-80 at Exit 223 in Youngstown/Austintown.

name: TA Youngstown #058 - CAT Scale
description: Certified CAT Scale at the TA travel center on free I-80 at Exit 223A in Youngstown.

name: Pilot #281 - CAT Scale
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Pilot travel center on free I-80 at Exit 226 in Girard.

name: Petro Girard #320 - CAT Scale
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Petro/TA stopping center on free I-80 at Exit 226 in Girard.

name: Love's #370 - CAT Scale
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Love's travel stop on free I-80 at Exit 234 in Hubbard.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Girard
description: Blue Beacon truck/trailer wash located at the Petro Stopping Center on free I-80 at Exit 226 in Girard.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Hubbard (Truck World)
description: Blue Beacon truck/trailer wash located on the Truck World site on free I-80 at Exit 234 in Hubbard.

name: TA Truck Service - Petro Girard
description: On-site TA Truck Service shop (five bays) offering tire sales/repair and mechanical work at the Petro on free I-80 at Exit 226.

name: TA Truck Service - Youngstown #058
description: On-site TA Truck Service shop (five bays) offering tire and mechanical repair at the TA on free I-80 at Exit 223A.

name: Love's Tire Care - Hubbard #370
description: Love's truck service bays providing tire repair/replacement and light mechanical work at the Love's on free I-80 at Exit 234.

name: TA Truck Service RoadSquad (Youngstown)
description: 24-hour emergency roadside assistance (RoadSquad) dispatched from the TA/Petro truck service shops serving the I-80 Youngstown-Girard corridor.

name: I-80 Weigh Station (Hubbard, Westbound)
description: Westbound-only truck weigh/inspection station on free I-80 near Hubbard, about 2.5 miles west of OH-7 (approx. milepost 232), just inside the Pennsylvania line.

name: Travelodge by Wyndham at Truck World
description: Motel on the Truck World truck-stop property at free I-80 Exit 234 in Hubbard, adjacent to the large truck parking lot.
